code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut sorted = true
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0
mut cur = 0
mut in_num = false
mut neg = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      -1
    end
  else
    -1
  end

  let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57

  if is_digit
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
      neg = false
    end
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    in_num = true
    cur = 0
    neg = true
  else
    if in_num
      let value = if neg
        0 - cur
      else
        cur
      end
      if has_prev
        if value < prev
          sorted = false
        end
      end
      prev = value
      has_prev = true
      in_num = false
      neg = false
      cur = 0
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if sorted
  print("YES")
else
  print("NO")
end
